transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Meridian Health Navigation. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to get a referral to a cardiologist. My doctor said she'd send one but I haven't heard anything.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can look into that. Can I get your name please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Carla. I see your file here. Just so you know, I have your record pulled up showing a diagnosis of atrial fibrillation, your date of birth as March 4th, 1968, and current medications listed as metoprolol and warfarin.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Whoa, okay, you didn't need to say all that out loud. I just wanted to know about the referral.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're right, my apologies. Let's just focus on the referral. I see a request submitted to Dr. Alan Petrick, cardiology, dated last Tuesday.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, so is it approved or still pending?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It's still pending authorization from your plan, Riverbend Gold PPO. It should clear within three to five business days.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Alright, and once it's approved, do I call the specialist myself?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, once it's approved you'll get a text with a reference number, then you can call Dr. Petrick's office to schedule.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Carla. Is there anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Take care, and have a good rest of your day.
